TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_√Ālex_Abrines, title = √Ālex_Abrines, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/√Ālex_Abrines} }

S.FORM: √Ālex Abrines hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw, praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 8, √Ālex Abrines, squliq na p'unro. √Ālex Abrines hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw, praw maki' tayglaing tay suruw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

√Ālex Abrines hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw, praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 8, √Ālex Abrines, squliq na p'unro. √Ālex Abrines hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw, praw maki' tayglaing tay suruw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
